title: Neela

'''Neela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who was the wife of [[Greedo the Elder]], mother of the younger [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] and [[Pqweeduk]], and the younger sister of [[Nok (Rodian)|Nok]] and [[Teeku]].

==Biography==
After her husband was murdered by [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]] during the clan purges, Neela fled [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] with her then-two-year-old son, along with other members of her family and [[Tetsu Clan|Tetsu clan]], for the safety of the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Greedo's Tale" /> [[U-Tendik]].<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> There, she gave birth to her second son, [[Pqweeduk]], and raised the boys in the more peaceful ways of their clan. She tried to shelter Greedo and Pqweeduk from their violent past, but thirteen years later Greedo discovered one of the hidden colony ships and wanted to know more. Soon afterward, Navik and other [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]] hunters found the refugees, slaughtering them. Neela, her sons, her brothers, and a few remnants of the clan barely got away, relocating to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="Greedo's Tale" /> Neela hoped to eventually move them into the protection of [[Avaro Sookcool]].<ref name="New Essential Guide to Characters">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

===Nar Shaddaa===
Neela found work as a housekeeper and lived in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] on [[Level 88]] with her family and remaining clanmembers. The Rodian refugees remained there for four years, during which young Greedo grew into a petty street kid. As Greedo was following along with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Spurch Goa|Spurch "Warhog" Goa]] and [[Dyyz Nataz]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack was initiated, sending Level 88 ablaze.<ref name="Greedo's Tale" /> Neela and most of the clanmembers were killed, leaving Greedo an orphan.<ref name="New Essential Guide to Characters" />
